title: Open Vet Format (OVF)
description: Root export schema for the VetNote Open Vet Format. Wraps all veterinary medical record resources for a single patient into a portable, interoperable document.

exporter.description: Information about the software that generated this OVF export.

name.description: Name of the exporting software or system.

format_version.description: Semantic version of the OVF format used in this export.

exported_at.description: Timestamp when this export was generated in ISO 8601 format.

patient.description: The patient whose medical records are contained in this export.

encounters.description: Clinical encounters or visits for the patient.

conditions.description: Diagnosed conditions or health problems for the patient.

observations.description: Clinical observations and measurements for the patient.

procedures.description: Clinical procedures performed on the patient.

allergy_intolerances.description: Allergies and intolerances identified for the patient.

document_references.description: Documents and files associated with the patient.
